x-enumeration-literals.name: Short Position
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A short position refers to a trading technique in which an investor sells a security with plans to buy it later. (Investopedia)
https://www.investopedia.com/terms/s/short.asp

x-enumeration-literals.name: Long Position
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The term long position describes what an investor has purchased when they buy a security or derivative with the expectation that it will rise in value. (Investopedia)
https://www.investopedia.com/terms/l/long.asp
